response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and strong software craftsmanship practices, but the role specifically requires deep JVM expertise, Spring ecosystem proficiency, and genuine interest in IDE internals. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms work years ago) with no Kotlin, no Spring, and no demonstrated IDE-tooling work beyond peripheral C/C++ contributions to LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. The mismatch on core required qualifications is significant.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Experience with large-scale, performance-sensitive systems (Dunnhumby micro-services)
Tooling/framework author mindset (built test runner, assertion lib, web server in D)
concerns: No Kotlin experience and only minimal, dated Java exposure
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate ecosystem experience listed
No demonstrated IDE internals or JVM language-tooling work
